positive: Minimalist abstract mountain range silhouette against a vibrant watercolor sky, showing layered peaks and valleys. The style should be modern, whimsical, and serene, using bold linework and soft gradient fills. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for an apparel print. Clean, scalable vector aesthetic, graphic design print quality, perfect for screen printing.
